subcodes.title: Words spoken at House of Abbud in Akka, 1913-12-13
subcodes.first_line: How I longed for the re-appearance of these divine nights!... There is a place in America called Green Acre. It is customary during the months of summer
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @freedom of thought and action, @eulogies; reminiscences, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
